description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unittest that runs on every pull request to the main branch. The workflow has two jobs: unit and cover. The unit job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of Python versions from 3.7 to 3.13, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs nox, runs unit tests with nox, and uploads the coverage results as an artifact. The cover job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, depends on the unit job, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.8, installs coverage, downloads the coverage results, and reports the combined coverage results.
